reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This line incorrectly appends '&' to the token after already consuming the first '&', but the token was already set to "&" by catToken() before getchar(); this leads to token becoming "&&" even in error case, which is misleading.
